2355340.name: ShovelFall Demo
2355340.description:
Shovelfall is an action platformer with a fun and satisfying charge jump mechanic. Escape your heavenly imprisonment, battle those standing in your way. Dig, slash and journey from heaven through the 9 circles of Hell to reach the bottom of your destiny.

Features
Play as a bouncing Shovel with fun and satisfying controls
Sell your soul for items and upgrades
11 Worlds of levels themed around the 9 circles of hell from Dantes Inferno.
Banger 9-bit soundtrack by DDRKirby
